The persistent-slab-instability layer is sitting on the early-season faceted-snow grain-structure across the upper-elevation start-zone band on the windward-aspect alpine terrain, the wind-loading pattern on the leeward-aspect cross-loaded slopes has formed reactive wind-slab structures on the rolling test-pit shear-quality-one-and-two propagation cadence, the natural-and-human-triggered avalanche cycle is forecast across the prescribed elevation-and-aspect rose for the upper-and-middle-elevation start-zone bands, and the cornice-failure-onto-loaded-slope trigger pattern at the ridgeline-corniced-leeward-aspect dropoff threatens the down-slope start-zone propagation cycle.
